headline: DRUMSTICK TEAMS UP WITH CODY RHODES AHEAD OF WRESTLEMANIA® 42
summary: Drumstick®, the beloved sundae cone brand, is stepping back into the ring with WWE and WWE Superstar Cody "The American Nightmare" Rhodes to debut its new creative platform: Lick it. Flip it. Drumstick it, celebrating the joy of eating a Drumstick your way, whether starting at the top or going straight for the iconic chocolate nugget.
